findings: Deployment 67.44% — 2.56 pp UNDER the 0.70 cap, first tick this session the cap is not binding. Cash ₹324,460 is available for admission if quality gates are met.
AUBANK 18.51% of total (grandfathered MTM drift above 0.15 per-name cap since Day 1). No new AUBANK admission today; drift is mark-to-market, a tighter cap cannot retract.
BFSI still the dominant cluster at 35.88% of total (53.20% of deployed) — buffer to the 37% min_confidence-tightening trigger is 1.12 pp. Not firing this tick.

MAHABANK drag extended -6.42% (10:43) → -6.64% (11:13), +22 bps worsening in 30 min. Below the 11:00 min_sl_pct fire line (-6%) but above the pre-specified next-fire threshold (-7%). Hard stop ₹75.00 still intact (LTP ₹76.09, ~1.4% to stop).

Daily P&L -₹3,393.60 (-0.34% of portfolio). Well within the -1% findings-trigger buffer (₹6,572 headroom) and the -3% daily loss gate (buffer ~₹26,500). Day opened +₹2,062 and has marked down through morning session.

Strategy activity is REAL this session: 2 SELLs (TORNTPOWER +₹1,834, ADANIPOWER -₹409, net +₹1,424.80 realized) after 44h of silence. Positive structural signal — the admission-surface opening is earned by active trimming, not passive drift.
Composite HIGH meta-trigger is 1-of-3 firing: (i) strategy silent NO, (ii) MAHABANK <-5% YES, (iii) book <-0.5% NO (-0.34%). Risk level held at MEDIUM.
FMCG secondary cluster at 16.77% (NESTLEIND 12.10% + HINDUNILVR 4.67%). Below any trigger threshold; watching but not actionable.
Pending order book is empty — no in-flight OPEN orders to gate.
hold_rationale: No numeric overrides changed this tick. (1) min_sl_pct was just tightened 30 min ago (11:00, 0.005 → 0.01) on MAHABANK's -6.42% breach — stacking a second SL-floor lever now without a firing trigger would be decorative. (2) MAHABANK at -6.64% is 36 bps shy of the pre-specified -7% next-fire threshold; disciplined call is to wait for the confirmed further extension. (3) max_deployed_pct=0.70 just STOPPED binding for the first time this session via the two SELLs — re-closing the admission window now would undo the beneficial regime change (SELL → freed cash → quality-gated BUY) we want to reward. (4) Book is DOWN intraday (-0.34%) but still positive-buffer vs daily_loss_limit_pct — tightening 0.03 → 0.025 on a -0.34% book is theatrical. (5) BFSI 35.88% remains inside the 37% min_confidence-raise trigger; no new BFSI admissions today. (6) AUBANK 18.51% is grandfathered drift — tighter max_position_pct cap cannot retract mark-to-market.

watch_triggers_next_tick.if_MAHABANK_pnl_pct_le_-7.00: Consider tightening max_sl_pct 0.04 → 0.03 AND/OR elevating to HIGH risk level if book also <-0.5%.
watch_triggers_next_tick.if_deployed_pct_back_above_0.70_via_new_: Reassess — the 0.70 cap should rebind; if it does not, investigate strategy-layer bypass.
watch_triggers_next_tick.if_strategy_submits_new_BFSI_entry: Fire min_confidence 0.60 → 0.65 even if BFSI not yet at 37%, to prevent cluster re-inflation.
